NA

Source: DEVELOPERS.md

Development

Common tasks are available via just, see the justfile:

just document   # roxygen documentation
just test       # run tests
just check      # R CMD check
just fix        # format R code with air
just docs       # build and preview the pkgdown site
just build-data # re-fetch the bundled sample data from BigQuery

Tests run against an in-memory duckdb database and bundled sample data, so no BigQuery credentials are needed for development.

Developed by Milan Wiedemann.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
